leadText: Shadow Sky (Japanese: ダークウェザー Dark Weather) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Pokémon is purified.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Sky covers the field in a shadowy aura that lasts for five turns. While in effect, all non-Shadow Pokémon (except those in the semi-invulnerable turn of Dig or Dive) are damaged at the end of each turn by 1/16 of their maximum HP, Shadow moves have their power boosted by 50% (although this part is not mentioned in game), and Weather Ball changes to become typeless and has its power doubled.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD Darkness hurts all but Shadow Pokémon for 5 turns.
